settings.heading: Details & materials
settings.content: Crafted from recycled nylon with YKK zippers and brass hardware. Made in India by skilled artisans.

settings.heading: Shipping & returns
settings.content: Free shipping on orders over Rs 2,500. Free returns within 14 days of delivery.

settings.heading: Care guide
settings.content: Wipe clean with a damp cloth. Do not machine wash. Store in the dust bag provided.
